articles.title: Google Releases LiteRT.js: A JavaScript Binding of LiteRT That Runs .tflite Models in Browsers via WebGPU
articles.excerpt: Google released LiteRT.  It is a JavaScript binding of LiteRT, Google's on-device inference library

articles.title: xAI releases Grok-4.3 with native long-horizon agent scaffolding
articles.excerpt: New model demonstrates 4.2× improvement on multi-step software engineering benchmarks and sustains coherent agent trajectories beyond 110k tokens.

articles.title: Figure 03 completes 43-hour autonomous factory shift with zero interventions
articles.excerpt: Humanoid achieves new milestone in unsupervised operation, performing 1,240 unique tasks across three assembly lines at the BMW South Carolina plant.

articles.title: PrismML Releases Bonsai 27B: 1-bit and Ternary Builds of Qwen3.6-27B That Run on Laptops and Phones
articles.excerpt: PrismML just released Bonsai 27B.  It is a low-bit representation of Qwen3

articles.title: Mistral Vibe for Code vs Claude Code vs Cursor vs Codex: Four Agents Scored on One Scaffold-to-PR Task

articles.title: OpenCoreDev Releases Domain SDK 0.2.0: One TypeScript API to Add, Verify, and Remove Customer Domains Across Five Platforms
articles.excerpt: OpenCoreDev has published Domain SDK 0. 0, a TypeScript client for the custom domain lifecycle

articles.title: Anthropic publishes unprecedented mechanistic interpretability map of Claude 4
articles.excerpt: Researchers reverse-engineered 312 million features inside the model, including the first clear "deception circuit" discovered in a frontier model.
